issues.description: Missing mandatory cost action. [On Block] DON!! −1 requires a cost that allows returning 1 DON!! card from field to DON!! deck before the power boost resolves. Current DSL omits the cost entirely.

Power boost effect is unconditional. Card text states 'You may return...': the power boost should only apply if the player chooses to and successfully pays the DON!! cost. Add condition or restructure to reflect optional cost.
